title: kv.metadata Facet
description: A KV secret's METADATA, projected by the openbao KV Syncer (ADR-0099; §1.1). Metadata ONLY — path/version/timestamps, NEVER the secret value (§1.2/§2.5). The secret-path map is sensitive by aggregation; the kv-secret kind is View/ReBAC-scoped. Closed schema matching normalizeSecret.
